chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.D-508 of 2026 [Mst. Dunia Khatoon and another vs. Province of Sindh and others] Date Order with the signature of the Judges 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2082/ 26 (Ex/A). 3. For the hearing of the main case 07.04.2026. None present for the Petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General, along with SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP Khairpur and ASI Muhammad Nawaz Markhand, I.O, P.S Abdul Rehman Unnar, Dist: Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.— The Investigation Officer is present and has submitted that the statement of the alleged abductee has been recorded, wherein she has not supported the version of the FIR. She has categorically stated that she has contracted marriage with Ihsan Ali (petitioner No. 2). The alleged abductee, being sui juris, is legally competent to make her own decisions and is entitled to live her life according to her free will, within the parameters of law. Since she has not supported the allegations levelled in the FIR, she is at liberty to reside and live in accordance with her own consent. The learned Assistant Prosecutor General submits that, after recording the statement of the alleged abductee, the Investigation Officer shall submit an appropriate report before the competent Court for disposal of the case. The Investigation Officer is directed to take necessary steps in accordance with law. 2 The police functionaries are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. In view of the above, the instant petition stands disposed of.
